placeholderImages.description: California State University Bakersfield campus with the Runner Park and modern facilities under a warm Central Valley sky.
CSU Channel Islands entrance sign with the campus name and mountains in the background in Camarillo.
Kendall Hall, the historic administrative heart of Chico State, on a clear day in 2023.
Welch Hall on the campus of California State University Dominguez Hills in Carson.
Aerial view of Cal State East Bay with Hayward, the East Bay hills, and San Francisco Bay in the background.
The Frank W. Thomas Administration Building at Fresno State, in Fresno, California.
Tree-lined walkway on the California State University Fullerton campus in Orange County.
Student and Business Services Building at Cal Poly Humboldt in Arcata, surrounded by Northern California greenery.
The iconic Walter Pyramid arena at California State University Long Beach.
The entrance sign of California State University Los Angeles campus.
Cal Maritime Academy campus in Vallejo with the Training Ship Golden Bear docked at the pier.
California State University Monterey Bay campus buildings on the former Fort Ord site in Seaside.
The Delmar T. Oviatt Library at California State University Northridge, the centerpiece of campus.
The CLA Building at Cal Poly Pomona with the snow-capped San Gabriel Mountains in the background on a winter day.
The Library Quad at Sacramento State University on a sunny day with students and lush campus greenery.
The entrance to California State University San Bernardino with the campus sign and mountain backdrop.
San Diego State University main campus view with historic buildings and the iconic red and black Aztec spirit.
The Administration Building at San Francisco State University on the main campus.
Tower Hall, the iconic landmark of San José State University and the oldest public university on the West Coast.
The Recreation Center at Cal Poly San Luis Obispo, showcasing modern campus facilities.
Kellogg Library at California State University San Marcos, the architectural centerpiece of campus.
The Green Music Center at Sonoma State University, a world-class performing arts venue in Rohnert Park.
The campus entrance sign at CSU Stanislaus in Turlock, welcoming visitors to the university.
